attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
RTM.ADVANCED_TECHNOLOGY_NAME,
BECB.DD_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
MCPH.HQ_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
RBQ.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
'ERP' ,
RBQ.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
RBQ.PARTNER_PARTY_SITE_KEY,
SUM(COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT * DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE) AS NET_BKGS
FROM
$$SLSORDVWDB.R_BKGS_BY_QUARTER RBQ
INNER JOIN
$$COMREFVWDB.N_TMS_CORP_PRODUCT_ALLOC NTCP
ON
RBQ.PRODUCT_KEY = NTCP.ITEM_KEY
INNER JOIN
$$COMREFVWDB.R_TECH_MKT_SEGMENT RTM
ON
RTM.TECHNOLOGY_MARKET_SEGMENT_KEY = NTCP.TECHNOLOGY_MARKET_SEGMENT_KEY
and HIERARCHY_TYPE = 'TMS_CORPORATE'
INNER JOIN
$$ETLVWDB.BT_END_CUSTOMER_BRIDGE BECB
ON
RBQ.END_CUSTOMER_KEY = BECB.END_CUSTOMER_KEY
AND
DD_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY NOT IN (-777,-888, -999)
INNER JOIN
$$COMREFVWDB.MT_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIERARCHY MCPH
ON
MCPH.BRANCH_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY = BECB.DD_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY
INNER JOIN
(SELECT fiscal_year_quarter_number_int , RANK() OVER (ORDER BY fiscal_year_quarter_number_int) AS RANK_quarter_number_int FROM 
 $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_quarter_TO_YEAR where fiscal_qtr_age >= 0
 and fiscal_year_number_int >=2000 
GROUP BY fiscal_year_quarter_number_int ) RANKID
ON  RBQ.fiscal_year_quarter_number_int= RANKID.fiscal_year_quarter_number_int
INNER JOIN
 (SELECT MINMAX.MIN_quarter_number_int, MINMAX.MAX_quarter_number_int, MAX(INRANKID.RANK_quarter_number_int) MAX_RANK_quarter_number_int
  FROM
(SELECT MIN(fiscal_year_quarter_number_int) MIN_quarter_number_int, MAX(fiscal_year_quarter_number_int) MAX_quarter_number_int FROM
 $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_quarter_TO_YEAR where fiscal_qtr_age >= 0
 and fiscal_year_number_int >=2000 
)MINMAX,
(SELECT fiscal_year_quarter_number_int , RANK() OVER (ORDER BY fiscal_year_quarter_number_int) AS rank_quarter_number_int FROM 
 $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_quarter_TO_YEAR where fiscal_qtr_age >= 0
 and fiscal_year_number_int >=2000 
GROUP BY fiscal_year_quarter_number_int ) INRANKID  
GROUP BY MINMAX.MIN_quarter_number_int , MINMAX.MAX_quarter_number_int ) MAXRANKID
ON
 RANKID.RANK_quarter_number_int <= (MAXRANKID.MAX_rank_quarter_number_int/2)
  GROUP BY
RTM.ADVANCED_TECHNOLOGY_NAME,
BECB.DD_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
MCPH.HQ_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
rbq.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
RBQ.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
RBQ.PARTNER_PARTY_SITE_KEY

SELECT
RTM.ADVANCED_TECHNOLOGY_NAME,
BECB.DD_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY ,
BECB.HQ_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
'POS' AS TRANSACTION_TYPE,
SOLD_TO_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
0
FROM
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE NPTL
INNER JOIN 
$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFDY
ON
NPTL.TRANSACTION_DATE = RFDY.CALENDAR_DATE           
AND  TRANSACTION_DATE <=  '2001-07-23'                
INNER JOIN
$$COMREFVWDB.N_TMS_CORP_PRODUCT_ALLOC NTCP                     
ON
NPTL.PRODUCT_KEY = NTCP.ITEM_KEY
INNER JOIN
$$COMREFVWDB.R_TECH_MKT_SEGMENT   RTM 
ON
RTM.TECHNOLOGY_MARKET_SEGMENT_KEY = NTCP.TECHNOLOGY_MARKET_SEGMENT_KEY
AND HIERARCHY_TYPE = 'TMS_CORPORATE'
INNER JOIN
$$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_ENDCUST_HIER BECB        
ON
NPTL.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY = BECB.END_CUSTOMER_KEY
GROUP BY
RTM.ADVANCED_TECHNOLOGY_NAME,
BECB.DD_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY ,
BECB.HQ_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
SOLD_TO_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY

SELECT
RTM.ADVANCED_TECHNOLOGY_NAME,
BECB.DD_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
MCPH.HQ_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
RBQ.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
'ERP' ,
RBQ.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
RBQ.PARTNER_PARTY_SITE_KEY,
SUM(COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT * DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE) AS NET_BKGS
FROM
$$SLSORDVWDB.R_BKGS_BY_QUARTER RBQ
INNER JOIN
$$COMREFVWDB.N_TMS_CORP_PRODUCT_ALLOC NTCP
ON
RBQ.PRODUCT_KEY = NTCP.ITEM_KEY
INNER JOIN
$$COMREFVWDB.R_TECH_MKT_SEGMENT RTM
ON
RTM.TECHNOLOGY_MARKET_SEGMENT_KEY = NTCP.TECHNOLOGY_MARKET_SEGMENT_KEY
and HIERARCHY_TYPE = 'TMS_CORPORATE'
INNER JOIN
$$ETLVWDB.BT_END_CUSTOMER_BRIDGE BECB
ON
RBQ.END_CUSTOMER_KEY = BECB.END_CUSTOMER_KEY
AND
DD_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY NOT IN (-777,-888, -999)
INNER JOIN
$$COMREFVWDB.MT_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIERARCHY MCPH
ON
MCPH.BRANCH_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY = BECB.DD_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY
INNER JOIN
(SELECT fiscal_year_quarter_number_int , RANK() OVER (ORDER BY fiscal_year_quarter_number_int) AS RANK_quarter_number_int FROM 
 $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_quarter_TO_YEAR where fiscal_qtr_age >= 0
 and fiscal_year_number_int >=2000 
GROUP BY fiscal_year_quarter_number_int ) RANKID
ON  RBQ.fiscal_year_quarter_number_int= RANKID.fiscal_year_quarter_number_int
INNER JOIN
 (SELECT MINMAX.MIN_quarter_number_int, MINMAX.MAX_quarter_number_int, MAX(INRANKID.RANK_quarter_number_int) MAX_RANK_quarter_number_int
  FROM
(SELECT MIN(fiscal_year_quarter_number_int) MIN_quarter_number_int, MAX(fiscal_year_quarter_number_int) MAX_quarter_number_int FROM
 $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_quarter_TO_YEAR where fiscal_qtr_age >= 0
 and fiscal_year_number_int >=2000 
)MINMAX,
(SELECT fiscal_year_quarter_number_int , RANK() OVER (ORDER BY fiscal_year_quarter_number_int) AS rank_quarter_number_int FROM 
 $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_quarter_TO_YEAR where fiscal_qtr_age >= 0
 and fiscal_year_number_int >=2000 
GROUP BY fiscal_year_quarter_number_int ) INRANKID  
GROUP BY MINMAX.MIN_quarter_number_int , MINMAX.MAX_quarter_number_int ) MAXRANKID
ON
 RANKID.RANK_quarter_number_int > (MAXRANKID.MAX_rank_quarter_number_int/2)
  GROUP BY
RTM.ADVANCED_TECHNOLOGY_NAME,
BECB.DD_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
MCPH.HQ_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
rbq.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
RBQ.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
RBQ.PARTNER_PARTY_SITE_KEY
